text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking through the school building, I spy
Kitasan Black smiling as she follows a rather
nervous-looking Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! On your right you can see a popular spot
among students at the academy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whenever they feel frustrated after losing a race,
they yell into the tree stump!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Got it! Hehe! Okay, next up is... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, hello! It's so, um, lovely to see you out and
about!
choice_data_list:
Uh... Er, it's nice to see you walking around,
too?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's hilarious watching how awkward you
two are right now! But it's all right! There's no
need to be so formal, so relax!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! Inhale... Exhale...
choice_data_list: So, what are you two up to anyway?
So, what are you two up to anyway?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Unfortunately, I am unable to attend to
you since I'm on the clock and working with Prez
today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but have no fear! My friend, Special Week,
will fill in for me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
G-greetings! My name is Special Week! I hope to
be of much help to you today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! No need to be so proper, Spe! You're an
upperclassman now, so don't be afraid to carry
yourself with a little more dignity!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Teio, my task today is merely an
inspection, so I do not require help if you are
busy...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Don't even think about it, Prez! I already
decided I'd be helping you today, so you'd better
take me along!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Anyway, that's why Spe is filling in for Teio today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
As her upperclassman, I thought it'd be
appropriate to give her a guided tour around the
school! But what else can I show her? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but Kitasan Black has been at Tracen
for a while, so giving her a school tour now seems
kind of pointless...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Psst, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're thinking, but all I want right
now is to be pampered by my kind, reliable
upperclassman!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I think you've basically shown me everything
there is to see around campus, so hmm... What
else can we do?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to go partner running with you and pick
your brain for recommendations on what to order
at the school cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've heard so much about your achievements and
would love to uncover the secret of your strength!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-sure! Okay, we can do that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't shake the feeling that their roles as upper
and underclassman have reversed in terms of
who's leading who...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Which do you think we should do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black shoots me a meaningful look. It
seems she wants me to make the decision so she's
not the one taking the lead from her
upperclassman.
choice_data_list: Why don't we get some food together?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's go, then!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's run another lap!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll definitely cross the finish line before
you overtake me this time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, look at that! Kita and Spe are getting on so
well!
choice_data_list:
Huh? Weren't you supposed to be inspecting
something?

Huh? Weren't you supposed to be inspecting
something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well... I kinda left halfway through. The whole
time I was out, I couldn't stop worrying about
those two.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I felt bad for having my head in the clouds while I
was with Prez, so I decided to come back and put
on my mantle as a good upperclassman.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but it seems like I was worrying over
nothing. No matter who she's dealing with...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Kita's a pro at getting people to open their
hearts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: V-very well, but I won't go down that easy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Look, Spe! They're serving miso ramen today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh... Did you know, Kita? There's also a secret menu!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Believe it or not, you can order a double portion
of soft-boiled egg from it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wooow! A double portion?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since we've entered her area of expertise, Special
Week does a 180, taking on a new air of
seniority.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're incredible, Spe! You know
everything there is to know about food!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yup! I've got your back when it comes to
food! Go ahead and order whatever you want! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It still feels like Kitasan's eagerness to be
pampered is what's giving Special Week a bit
more room to flex her seniority.
